title: selaginella rupestris f. hansenii
intro: Selaginella rupestris f. hansenii, also known as the "Rock Spikemoss," is a species of spikemoss that belongs to the family Selaginellaceae. It is a type of fern-like plant that is native to the tropical regions of Central and South America. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. It can be prepared into various herbal remedies such as teas, tinctures, and salves, which are believed to promote wound healing, reduce pain and inflammation, and support the immune system.
